risk_if_not_implemented: Without Resume All Missions & Business Functions, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Asset Categorization
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to categorize Technology Assets, Applications and/or Services (TAAS).
compensating_control_1.justification: Asset Categorization (AST-31) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Resume All Missions & Business Functions (BCD-02.1) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Asset Inventories
compensating_control_2.justification: Asset Inventories (AST-02) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Resume All Missions & Business Functions (BCD-02.1) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
